global.title: Typhoon Bavi approaches Japan, Taiwan and China - Reuters
global.summary: Typhoon Bavi is moving toward Japan, Taiwan and China, raising concern for a densely populated region already vulnerable to storm damage and disruption.
global.whyItMatters: A major storm invites prayer for protection, wise preparation and compassion for those who may face loss.

global.title: Wildfires in southern Spain kill 11, emergency agency says - Reuters
global.summary: Deadly wildfires in southern Spain have killed 11 people as extreme heat and fire conditions continue to strain communities and responders.
global.whyItMatters: This is a sobering reminder of creation’s fragility and the growing pastoral need to speak about grief, resilience and care for neighbors.

global.title: CNBC Daily Open: A week of narrative whiplash and vibe shifts - CNBC
global.summary: After sharp rhetoric at the NATO summit, U.S. officials now say they will hold technical talks with Iran, signaling a possible diplomatic opening despite recent strikes.
global.whyItMatters: Pastors should watch for shifts from escalation to diplomacy as people process fear, uncertainty and the hope for peace.

canadian.title: How TIME and Statista Determined Canada's Best Companies of 2026 - Time Magazine
canadian.summary: TIME and Statista outlined a new ranking of Canada’s best companies using employee satisfaction, revenue growth and sustainability transparency as key measures.
canadian.whyItMatters: It offers a useful window into the values shaping Canadian workplaces where many congregants spend most of their week.

canadian.title: AP investigation shows how AI and other American technologies are abused to fuel scam industry - ap.org
canadian.summary: An AP investigation traces how AI tools, internet infrastructure and satellite connectivity are being used to expand scam compounds in Myanmar and target victims at scale.
canadian.whyItMatters: This can help pastors warn congregants about digital deception while speaking wisely about technology, exploitation and human dignity.

local.title: A new report is warning of heavy levels of arsenic in some rice products - CTV News
local.summary: Beyond the main consumer alert, the regional roundup includes B.C. items such as a young bald eagle being returned to its nest after a rescue in Victoria and a Central Saanich farm marking its 100-year milestone.
local.whyItMatters: These local notes offer grounded community stories of stewardship, care for creation and long faithfulness in ordinary work.

persecutedChurch.title: Pastor freed from prison in China weeks after Trump requested his release - The Washington Post
persecutedChurch.summary: A prominent underground church pastor in China has been released after months in detention, though rights advocates say others connected to the church remain imprisoned.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: It is both an answer to prayer and a reminder to keep interceding for believers who are still detained.

persecutedChurch.title: As Christians are attacked in Israel, government shows little concern - The Washington Post
persecutedChurch.summary: Christians in Israel report rising hostility and violence, saying attackers appear emboldened and that official concern has been limited.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This helps pastors pray more specifically for vulnerable Christian communities in the Holy Land and speak about solidarity across traditions.

leadership.title: Escaping The Survival Mode That Sabotages Leadership - Forbes
leadership.summary: This piece argues that resilient leadership is not constant intensity but the ability to pause, reset and protect margin before burnout takes over.
leadership.whyItMatters: A pastor leading through constant demands may need this reminder that healthy pauses are part of faithful leadership, not a failure of it.

goodNews.title: Good News: Bride-to-be’s hotel hail mary pays off ahead of her wedding - NBC News
goodNews.summary: An NFL team owner stepped in to help a bride-to-be when her wedding plans hit an unexpected obstacle, turning a stressful moment into a story of generosity.
goodNews.whyItMatters: It is a simple, shareable example of timely kindness that can encourage a congregation toward practical generosity.
